/usr/bin/cc CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/rastxt.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/abstree.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/cif.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/cif_ctonum.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/cif_fract.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/cif_stx.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/cmndline.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/command.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/infile.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/langsel_unix.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/maps.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/molecule.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/multiple.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/outfile.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/pixutils.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/render.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/repres.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/script.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/tokens.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/transfor.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/vector.c.o CMakeFiles/rastxt.dir/src/wbrotate.c.o -o rastxt  -lm
